TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Snuwing, title = Snuwing, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Snuwing} }

S.FORM: snuwing Itiniay i Ren'ai Cen no Nantou ko snuwing a niyaro', 364 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,246 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 1,156 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 90 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Seediq76%, Tayal13%, Bunun2%, Amis1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: sno~u~uwiŋ itiniaj i rənʡai ʦən no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u sno~u~uwiŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u səəɬ~ɮi***%, tajaɾ**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, amis*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: snuwing Itiniay i Ren'ai Cen no Nantou ko snuwing a niyaro', 364 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,246 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 1,156 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 90 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Seediq76%, Tayal13%, Bunun2%, Amis1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: sno~u~uwiŋ itiniaj i rənʡai ʦən no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u sno~u~uwiŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u səəɬ~ɮi***%, tajaɾ**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, amis*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
